raw_text:

The values are provided: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs. They want exactly three lines, with no headings, explanations, JSON, Markdown, or extra lines. So output exactly:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra spaces before/after lines. That is it.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
